motion.name: ease-settle
motion.purpose: Default settle-out easing for hover/lift and reveal.

components.name: Primary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #C0272D; color: #fff; padding: 14px 28px; border-radius: 14px; border: none; font-weight: 600; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; transition: background 180ms cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1), transform 180ms cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1), box-shadow 180ms cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #9E1F24; transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(14,27,52,0.08); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid #F4B41A; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Icon Badge
components.description: Signature 48px circular icon container replacing every emoji icon site-wide.
components.css: .ds-icon-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 48px; height: 48px; border-radius: 999px; background: #FBE7B4; }

components.name: Card
components.css: .ds-card { background: #FFFFFF; border: 1px solid #E7E2D9; border-radius: 14px; padding: 24px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(14,27,52,0.06); transition: transform 320ms cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1), box-shadow 320ms cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1); } .ds-card:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(14,27,52,0.08); } .ds-card h3 { font-family: 'Fraunces', serif; font-weight: 500; color: #0E1B34; } .ds-card p { font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; color: #2A3A57; line-height: 1.65; }

narrative.overview: The school motto is the design thesis, not a decoration on top of it. Every premium choice traces back to warmth and clarity: a soft gold glow behind the hero headline, a thin gold underline on section labels, a gold spark on achievement stats. This is a tailored-suit system: the original gap was unfinished craft, not missing features, so this system fixes craft and rejects both generic AI-marketing defaults (cream bg, terracotta accent) and decorative clutter.
keyCharacteristics: One signature move (gold light-glow), everything else quiet and consistent
Warm off-white surfaces, never stark white or cream-default
Fraunces serif paired against Plus Jakarta Sans
Soft, warm-tinted, layered shadows, never flat

rules.name: The Rarity Rule
rules.body: Gold appears as a glow, an underline, or a spark, never as a fill covering more than a sliver of any surface, and never as text on a light background.

rules.name: The Two-Voice Rule
rules.body: Only Fraunces and Plus Jakarta Sans exist in this system. No third family, no silent fallback to a browser default.

rules.name: The No-Flat-Card Rule
rules.body: A card never sits at shadow: none. If a surface needs to look flat, use a hairline border instead of removing elevation.

dos: Do use Fraunces for every heading and Plus Jakarta Sans for every paragraph/label.
Do keep gold rare: glows, underlines, sparks, icon fills on dark backgrounds only.
Do give every card an ambient, warm-tinted shadow at rest and deepen it on hover.
Do give every interactive element a real hover, focus-visible (3px gold outline), and active state.
Do use the 48px circular icon badge for every icon, replacing every emoji site-wide.
Do reserve numbered 01/02/03 markers for genuine sequences only.
donts: Don't use the generic AI-default look: cream background + high-contrast serif + terracotta accent.
Don't use emoji as icons anywhere in the interface.
Don't use pure saturated red (#FF0000) or pure yellow (#FFFF00).
Don't use border-left/border-right as a colored accent stripe.
Don't use decorative glassmorphism, the generic hero-metric template, or identical repeated card grids as default scaffolding.
Don't put a tiny uppercase tracked eyebrow above every section reflexively.
Don't ship a flat, shadowless card.
Don't use transition-all; animate only transform/opacity/color/shadow with a prefers-reduced-motion alternative.
